subject: WM-0125 review: changes_requested
body: High: M8 load/resume accepts out-of-gate ticks: load rebuilds from parsed createdTick yet returns M8_LOAD_TICK, and resume can finish at save tick before load tick, violating the focused 72000/72001 gate. Medium: parseM8AdvanceCommandId accepts trailing junk via parseInt, collapsing malformed command ids. Required review checks passed.
